name: Amo View
privacyPolicy:
Amo View — Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 20 May 2026

1. Who We Are

Amo View is a global streaming, learning, and creator-monetisation platform. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have over it. It applies to the Amo View mobile apps and any related services we offer.

2. Information We Collect

We collect only what we need to run the service:

  • Account & profile: name, username, email, phone number, profile picture, gender, date of birth, country, preferred currency, and an optional bio.
  • Authentication: if you sign up with a password, we store it as a one-way salted hash — never in plain text. If you use a third-party sign-in provider (e.g. Google, Apple), we only receive the basic profile fields you authorise.
  • Identity verification (optional): if you apply for a verified creator badge, we collect a legal name, a government-issued ID image, and a selfie. These are reviewed only by our internal moderation team and are not shared externally.
  • Content you upload: the videos, audio, books, livestreams, playlists, and short episodic series you publish, plus the titles, descriptions, thumbnails, categories, and pricing you attach to them.
  • Activity: watch history, likes, comments, subscriptions, saves, search queries, viewing-time records (used for creator earnings and analytics), and the devices you sign in from.
  • Wallet & transactions: wallet balance, top-ups, payouts, withdrawals, purchases, and a ledger of every credit and debit. We never see your full payment-instrument details — they stay with the regulated payment provider you choose.
  • Messaging: chat threads, messages, and media you share through in-app messaging and broadcast channels.
  • Device & technical data: device model, operating-system version, app version, a device identifier, IP address, push-notification token, and crash / error logs.
  • Live media: when you join or host a live session, audio and video are relayed only for the duration of that session and are not recorded by us unless you explicitly choose to.

3. How We Use Your Data

  • To create your account, sign you in, and keep the service running.
  • To deliver the content you ask for and pay creators the share they have earned.
  • To process payments, top-ups, and withdrawals through licensed payment partners.
  • To send notifications you have opted in to (new content from people you follow, messages, live invitations, payout updates).
  • To detect abuse, fraud, copyright infringement, and content that violates our Community Guidelines.
  • To comply with applicable law and respond to lawful requests from authorities.

4. Categories of Third Parties We Share Data With

We do not sell your personal data. We share only what is necessary to provide the service, and only with vetted processors bound by contract:

  • Cloud hosting and content-delivery providers — to host and stream your uploads to viewers.
  • Push-notification and crash-reporting providers — to deliver alerts and diagnose issues.
  • Real-time media providers — to power live audio / video sessions and calls.
  • Payment providers — to handle deposits, withdrawals, and creator payouts.
  • Google Gemini — powers our in-app AI features (such as summarisation and content Q&A). Only the content you submit to the AI feature is sent; never your account credentials.
  • Authorities — when we are legally compelled to disclose (for example, a valid court order).

You can request the current list of named sub-processors by emailing support@amoview.com.

5. How We Protect Your Data

  • All traffic between the app and our servers is encrypted in transit.
  • Authentication tokens are stored in the device's secure enclave; passwords are one-way hashed.
  • Internal admin actions are role-gated and recorded in an audit trail.
  • Paid content is served via short-lived, viewer-locked signed URLs.

6. Data Retention

We keep account-level data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, we permanently remove your profile, channel, and push tokens within 24 hours. Records we are legally required to keep — such as financial ledgers for tax and audit purposes — are retained for the period required by law and are detached from your personal identity wherever possible.

7. Your Rights

  • Access & edit: view and edit your profile from Settings > Edit profile.
  • Export: request a copy of your data by emailing support@amoview.com.
  • Block / unblock: manage blocked users in Settings > Privacy & Security.
  • Revoke devices: sign out other devices from Privacy & Security > Manage devices.
  • Clear watch history: available in Privacy & Security.
  • Delete your account: use the in-app option in Settings > Privacy & Security, or this Account Deletion page — no password required, works for all sign-in methods.
  • Object, correct, or restrict processing in line with applicable data-protection law. Contact us using the address below.

8. International Transfers

Amo View is a global service. Your data may be processed in countries other than the one you live in. Where required, we use appropriate safeguards (such as standard contractual clauses) to protect transfers across borders.

9. Children

Amo View is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age required by your country, if higher). If we discover an account belongs to a child under that age, we will delete it.

10. Contact

Questions about this policy, or to exercise any of the rights above? Email support@amoview.com.

11. Changes

If we make material changes to this policy, we will notify you in the app and update the date at the top of this page.
terms:
Amo View — Terms of Service

Last Updated: 20 May 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By creating an Amo View account or using the Amo View apps, you agree to these Terms and to our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old, or the minimum age required by your country if it is higher, to create an account. To monetize content, withdraw funds, or unlock a verified creator badge, you must be 18 years old or older and complete identity verification.

3. Your Account

  • You are responsible for keeping your sign-in credentials confidential and for any activity that happens under your account.
  • Notify us immediately at support@amoview.com if you believe your account has been accessed without your permission.
  • One person, one account. Accounts may not be shared or sold.

4. Content You Upload

  • You retain ownership of the content you upload. You grant Amo View a worldwide, royalty-free licence to host, stream, encode, and distribute that content within Amo View, only as needed to operate the service.
  • You must have all necessary rights to the content you upload. Do not upload material that infringes copyright, contains hate speech, sexually exploits minors, glorifies violence, or violates our Community Guidelines.
  • We use automated tools and human moderators to review content. We may remove content or restrict accounts that violate these Terms, with or without notice.

5. Wallet, Payments, and Monetization

  • Top-ups and withdrawals are processed through licensed payment partners. The available payment methods, supported currencies, and any fees are shown to you at checkout.
  • Creators earn a share of net revenue from paid views, unlocks, gifts, and bookings. The exact split for any product is shown to you before publishing.
  • Withdrawals are subject to identity verification and minimum-balance thresholds. Limits and timing may vary by country and payment method.
  • Disputed transactions: contact support@amoview.com within 14 days of the transaction.

6. Prohibited Conduct

  • No scraping, reverse-engineering, or automated abuse of the service.
  • No bypassing paywalls, watermarks, or other protection mechanisms.
  • No re-uploading other creators' content without permission.
  • No spam, phishing, harassment, or other behaviour that targets or harms other users.

7. Live Streaming & Messaging

You are responsible for what you say and show in live sessions, broadcast channels, and direct messages. Live content can be reported and reviewed by our moderation team. Severe violations result in immediate account suspension.

8. Service Availability

We aim for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. We may add, modify, or discontinue features at any time. We will give reasonable notice for changes that materially affect creators' ability to earn.

9. Termination & Account Deletion

You may delete your account at any time from Settings > Privacy & Security > Delete account, or via the Account Deletion page on this Trust Center. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms; in those cases, unpaid creator earnings tied to disputed activity may be withheld pending review.

10. Disclaimer & Liability

The service is provided "as is." To the maximum extent allowed by applicable law, Amo View is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which Amo View is incorporated, without regard to its conflict-of-law provisions. Nothing in these Terms affects mandatory consumer-protection rights that local law grants you and that cannot be contracted out of.

12. Contact

Questions about these Terms? Email support@amoview.com.

name: ADM Ministry
privacyPolicy:
Privacy Policy for ADM Ministry

Effective Date: 01 March 2026

1. Introduction

ADM Ministry Platform is dedicated to protecting the privacy of our members, staff, and leadership. This policy outlines how we collect, store, and secure your personal and spiritual data.

2. Information We Collect

We collect information necessary to facilitate church operations and communication:

  • Identification: Full name, gender, marital status, and baptism records.
  • Contact: Phone numbers and email addresses for ministry alerts and OTP verification.
  • Ministry Data: Assigned branches, departments (e.g., Choir, Ushers), and leadership roles.
  • Financial Records: Tracking of tithes, offerings, and pledges for ministry accounting.

3. Data Usage & Security

Your data is used strictly for internal ministry purposes, such as attendance tracking and financial reporting. We implement the following security measures:

  • Encryption: All passwords and sensitive tokens are cryptographically secured.
  • Access Control: Data is only visible to authorized personnel like Pastors and Treasurers.
  • Infrastructure: We use secure hosting and trusted SMS gateways for all communications.

4. Your Rights & Account Deletion

You have the right to review your data or request its removal. To permanently erase your profile and deactivate your account, please use the Account Deletion tool found in the app settings or on this compliance hub. Once authenticated, your personally identifiable information will be removed from our active databases.

5. Contact Information

For questions regarding your data, please contact your local Branch Administrator or the Ministry Head Office.
terms:
Terms of Service

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing the ADM Ministry Platform, you agree to abide by these terms. This platform is provided for the sole purpose of supporting church administration and member spiritual growth.

2. User Accounts & Security

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. Any activity performed under your account is your responsibility. You must immediately notify an Admin if you suspect unauthorized access.

3. Code of Conduct

Users must interact with the platform in a manner consistent with ministry values. Unauthorized attempts to access data outside of your assigned role or branch are strictly prohibited.

4. Administrative Responsibilities

Leaders and Administrators (Pastors, Treasurers, etc.) agree to handle member data with the highest level of confidentiality. Misuse of financial records or personal member information is grounds for immediate termination of access and potential disciplinary action.

5. Service Limitations

We strive for 100% uptime but do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features necessary for the security and efficiency of the ministry.
